key_observations: Comprehensive initial migration for orders module
Defines 7 models: Zone, Table, QRCode, QRScan, Order, OrderItem, ServiceRequest
Implements soft-delete pattern with deleted_at field
Uses UUID primary keys across all models
Includes extensive database constraints and indexes for query optimization
Contains detailed field documentation via help_text and verbose_name
Models include JSONField for extensible settings/metadata
Proper foreign key relationships with CASCADE deletion rules
Implements multi-tenancy via organization foreign key
Supports optional branch-level organization for multi-location support

patterns_discovered.description: All models inherit common audit fields (created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) and UUID primary key
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent auditing, soft-delete capability, and unique identification across domain

patterns_discovered.description: Every model includes organization ForeignKey with CASCADE deletion
patterns_discovered.benefit: Complete data isolation between tenants with automatic cleanup

patterns_discovered.description: Composite indexes on frequently queried field combinations (org+status, org+zone, zone+status)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Optimized query performance for multi-tenant filtering and status lookups

patterns_discovered.description: Slugs and codes are unique within organization scope, not globally
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables reuse of identifiers across different organizations

patterns_discovered.description: Settings and metadata JSONFields for future extensibility without schema changes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Forward compatibility and reduced migration needs for new configuration options

patterns_discovered.description: CASCADE for organizational relationships, SET_NULL for optional references (menu, table)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents orphaned records while maintaining referential integrity

patterns_discovered.description: created_at, updated_at, deleted_at provide complete lifecycle tracking
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables compliance, debugging, and soft-delete recovery

gotchas_discovered.description: deleted_at field enables soft deletes, but queries must explicitly filter on this field
gotchas_discovered.implications: Default querysets will include soft-deleted records unless custom managers override this
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Implement custom QuerySet with auto-filtering for deleted_at=null

gotchas_discovered.description: Table.status uses hardcoded choices [AVAILABLE, OCCUPIED, RESERVED]
gotchas_discovered.implications: Adding new statuses requires migration and code changes
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider moving status choices to a choice class or enum for maintainability

gotchas_discovered.description: QRCode can link to Table, Menu, and Campaign; Order links to Table; potential complexity
gotchas_discovered.implications: Cascading deletes could affect multiple downstream models
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Document deletion order and consider audit logging for critical deletes

gotchas_discovered.implications: Must always include organization in queries to ensure uniqueness
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Create custom model manager that auto-filters by organization context

gotchas_discovered.description: scan_count and unique_scan_count are cached integers, not derived from QRScan counts
gotchas_discovered.implications: Risk of counter drift if not properly incremented on every scan
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Implement transactional increment in scan tracking and periodic reconciliation task

gotchas_discovered.description: Branch field is nullable but has composite indexes including it
gotchas_discovered.implications: Queries filtering by branch=null may not use index effectively
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider partial indexes for nullable fields or ensure branch is always set

implementation_approach: Analyzed requirements for orders module (zones, tables, qr codes, orders, items, service requests)
Generated comprehensive Django migration with all 7 models and relationships
Implemented multi-tenancy via organization FK pattern
Added extensive indexing for query optimization
Included soft-delete capability via deleted_at field
artifacts_produced: Complete initial migration file with 485 lines
7 fully-defined models with fields, constraints, and indexes
Proper foreign key relationships and cascade rules
success_factors: Comprehensive schema design with proper normalization
Multi-tenancy architecture from the ground up

recommendations.recommendation: Create custom QuerySet manager for automatic soft-delete filtering
recommendations.rationale: All models use soft-delete pattern; default behavior should exclude deleted records

recommendations.recommendation: Implement automatic transaction-safe counter increment for QRScan tracking
recommendations.rationale: Cached counters in QRCode model risk drift; need atomic updates

recommendations.recommendation: Add comprehensive migration tests for all relationships and constraints
recommendations.rationale: Complex schema with 30+ indexes; need to verify database integrity

recommendations.recommendation: Document table status workflow transitions (AVAILABLE -> OCCUPIED -> AVAILABLE)
recommendations.rationale: Status choices are hardcoded; developers need clear state machine documentation

recommendations.recommendation: Create custom model managers that auto-filter by organization context
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenancy requires organization filtering on almost every query

recommendations.recommendation: Add partial indexes for nullable fields (branch, expires_at)
recommendations.rationale: Composite indexes on nullable fields may not be used efficiently by query planner

recommendations.recommendation: Consider moving hardcoded status choices to enum or choice class
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability and reduces migration burden for new statuses

recommendations.recommendation: Document cascade delete behavior and cleanup order for related models
recommendations.rationale: Complex relationships between QRCode, Table, Menu require clear deletion semantics
